title: Autonomous Rover Stack
summary: A rover control and autonomy stack that combines Jetson-side command tools, controller firmware, packet helpers, missions, calibration, and perception experiments.
highlights: Built mission CLIs for manual and fixed autonomous runs.
Structured route and pickup tests as JSON mission files.
Ran calibration tests for encoders and IMU-based sensor fusion.
Connected perception and alignment experiments to movement behavior.

title: World of Widebodies
summary: Worked with a US-based startup focused on reducing airline fuel costs through operational data, analytics, intelligent querying, and flight-level simulation.
highlights: Built dashboards in Power BI and Amazon QuickSight for aviation operations data.
Analyzed more than 5 million flight records, including flight plans, loadsheets, OAG schedules, and ADS-B tracking data.
Developed natural-language intelligent chatbots that queried proprietary airline flight and ground-operations data within seconds.
Explored weight and balance workflows across narrowbody, widebody, and regional aircraft.
Built production-ready simulations for individual flights.
Worked with aviation industry leaders and learned from a strong, deeply experienced team.

title: Dual Arduino Control Architecture
summary: A multi-controller setup for command routing, sensor handling, actuator control, and serial packet communication.
highlights: Separated command and sensor responsibilities across boards.
Documented connection maps and testing procedures.
Created packet helpers to make host-controller communication clearer.

title: Rover Testing Utilities
summary: A suite of GUI and CLI utilities for exercising motors, flippers, servos, SSH workflows, and serial paths during hardware bring-up.
highlights: Built separate tools for individual components and paired movement tests.
Improved iteration speed by making hardware checks more direct.
Created reference documents for firmware commands and pinouts.

title: Arm, IMU, Encoder, and Sensor Work
summary: Focused experiments around robotic arm testing, IMU readings, encoder behavior, and rover sensor-controller sketches.
highlights: Developed small test surfaces for specific hardware subsystems.
Kept calibration and sensor state visible during integration.
Used the results to guide the next layer of rover reliability.
